title: URL References, Resolution, Identity Keys, Unicode, and Canonicalization · Code Recall
summary: A delayed crawl review reconstructs url references, resolution, identity keys, unicode, and canonicalization from authorization, revision, seed, URL key, response identity, robots decision, parse record, extraction provenance, frontier event, report row, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for URL resolution and identity pipeline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Parse scheme, authority, userinfo, host, port, path, query, and fragment without treating a URL as a trustworthy string.
Resolve relative, scheme-relative, path-relative, query-only, and fragment-only references against the effective document base.
Remove fragments from network-fetch identity while preserving them when the stakeholder report needs document-location evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review site-quality team handles case 6590 during a keyboard and screen-reader report review. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile URL parsing, base resolution, fragment handling, conservative fetch identity, and Unicode host evidence; the target owner must be able to pause the crawl; then introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep display and network host forms distinct, validate Unicode and IDNA conversions, and make confusable or failed conversions visible.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Unicode hostnames and their ASCII forms are interchangeable without validation.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep display and network host forms distinct, validate Unicode and IDNA conversions, and make confusable or failed conversions visible. Artifact under review: URL resolution and identity pipeline.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner authorization, revision, URL and robots policy, response budgets, parser and selector limits, provenance, frontier and concurrency evidence, changed fixtures, privacy, security, accessibility, stop, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as crawler proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Unicode Idna Boundary, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
